name: manual_72a593
claim: Never use simple color inversion for light/dark mode toggles. Avoid harsh black outlines in light mode or white outlines in dark mode; maintain sophisticated gray/transparent borders. Use Black text for visibility in light mode, not just inverted gray.

decisions.notes: Previous attempts at simple inversion failed the user's quality standard and were described as 'terrible'. The site requires a premium aesthetic with specific accents (Cyan for light mode) and thoughtful color mapping.

rationale: Previous attempts at simple inversion failed the user's quality standard and were described as 'terrible'. The site requires a premium aesthetic with specific accents (Cyan for light mode) and thoughtful color mapping.
